gpt55_review_summary: Goodall the 3rd reviewed the namespace follow-up with GPT-5.5, found no issues, and approved. The reviewer also verified star-import does not expose the public or private help constants from the legacy facade.
scope: Legacy release-bundle namespace hygiene only; CLI behavior and release-bundle validation remain unchanged.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests; poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py::test_release_bundle_strict_release_help_stays_shared_between_public_and_legacy_clis tests/test_release_bundle.py::test_release_bundle_cli_help_documents_strict_release_requirements -q
what_changed: Kept the strict V1 release-bundle help constant private inside the legacy restaurant_kv_serving release-bundle facade while still reusing the canonical public text.
why: The legacy module has no curated __all__, so imported non-underscore names become visible through star import; the shared help text should not expand the legacy public surface.
